title: SET UP MEDICAL ID BEFORE YOU EVER NEED IT

title: LOCK YOUR PHONE FAST IF IT GETS SNATCHED

title: READ WHATSAPP VOICE NOTES AS TEXT
what_it_solves: Helps you catch up on long voice notes when you are in a meeting, on public transport, around other people, or simply not in the mood to listen.
what_to_do: Turn on WhatsApp voice message transcripts and read voice notes as text when needed.

steps.text: WhatsApp on your phone.
Settings, then Chats.
Voice Message Transcripts.
the language that matches most voice notes you receive.
Transcribe on a voice note when you want the text version.

note: This is brilliant for family groups, school groups, and work chats where people love sending 3-minute voice messages.

title: SUMMARIZE HUNDREDS OF UNREAD WHATSAPP MESSAGES
what_it_solves: Helps you catch up on overloaded chats without reading every unread message one by one.
what_to_do: Use WhatsApp’s message summaries with Meta AI to get a quick catch-up on unread messages when the feature is available to you.

steps.text: the individual or group chat you have not caught up on.
the unread message indicator above your unread messages.
message summaries if prompted.
the summary to understand the main points before diving in.
this for noisy groups, family planning chats, school announcements, or event threads.

note: Availability may vary, and this is optional. It is most useful for catching up fast, not for replacing careful reading of critical details.

title: ENCRYPT YOUR WHATSAPP BACKUP TOO
what_it_solves: Protects your cloud backup so your chats and media are not just secure in transit but also protected when stored.
what_to_do: Turn on end-to-end encrypted backup in WhatsApp instead of assuming normal cloud backup is equally private.

steps.text: WhatsApp and go to Settings.
Chats, then Chat Backup.
End-to-end encrypted backup.
and create a passkey, password, or 64-digit encryption key.
that recovery method safely so you do not lose access later.

note: If you forget the password or lose the encryption key, recovery can become very difficult. Set it up only after deciding where you will store the recovery method.

title: LET GOOGLE MESSAGES FLAG SPAM BEFORE YOU TAP
what_it_solves: Helps reduce the risk of fake bank alerts, scam prize messages, phishing links, and other malicious SMS traps.
what_to_do: Keep spam protection on in Google Messages and report suspicious threads instead of just deleting them.

steps.text: Google Messages on your Android phone.
your profile picture or initials.
Messages settings, then Spam protection.
Enable spam protection turned on.
suspicious messages as spam when they slip through.

note: Do not click first and think later. Spam filters help, but your own hesitation is still the strongest protection.

title: TURN ON LIVE TRANSCRIBE FOR REAL-WORLD SPEECH
what_it_solves: Helps you follow spoken conversations, announcements, counters, lectures, and noisy environments by turning speech into live text on your phone.
what_to_do: Use Live Transcribe on Android when hearing, accents, noise, or context make spoken words hard to catch.

steps.text: Live Transcribe on your Android device.
from Accessibility settings or the app shortcut.
your phone near the person or sound you want to capture.
the live text on screen as the speech happens.
it in classrooms, service counters, meetings, or family conversations when clarity matters.

note: This is an accessibility feature, but it is useful far beyond accessibility. It can rescue many everyday situations.
